::: {.profile-header}

::: {.profile-image}
![](images/Person%202.JPG)
:::

::: {.profile-intro}
# Sharon Yang

<p>Hello! Welcome to my personal profile! I’m a graduate student in **Business Analytics and AI** at The University of Texas at Dallas. I am interested in **data analytics**, **operations**, and **supply chain analytics**, and I enjoy using data to support better decision-making and improve business performance.</p>

<p>Through my academic, internship, and project experience, I have built hands-on skills in **data analysis**, **reporting**, **pricing analytics**, **risk-related data work**, and **cross-functional collaboration**. I am currently involved in an industry-sponsored project with FleetPride, where I help develop a pricing analytics framework and multi-level price elasticity models to evaluate how pricing decisions affect demand, revenue, and gross profit.</p>
:::

:::

## Areas of Interest

- Supply Chain Analytics
- Operations
- Business Analytics
- Pricing Analytics
- Data Analysis and Reporting
- Business Problem Solving

## Technical Skills

**Programming:** Python, SQL (MySQL), R  
**Data Tools:** Excel (Solver, XLOOKUP, PivotTables), Tableau, Stata  
**Analytics:** Regression, A/B Testing, Causal Inference, Time Series Analytics, Predictive Analytics, Pricing Analytics

## Contact Information

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sharon7691)
- [Email](mailto:sharony7691@gmail.com)

---
